zh.lifeSummary: 當John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick於大約1410年出生在英國武斯特斯爾波維其可時，他的父親William de Beauchamp56歲，母親Lady Catherine Ufflete42歲。他於1434年之前與Margaret de Ferrers在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1475年4月13日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾波維其可享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick于大约1410年出生在英国武斯特斯爾波維其可时，他的父亲William de Beauchamp56岁，母亲Lady Catherine Ufflete42岁。他于1434年之前与Margaret de Ferrers在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1475年4月13日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾波維其可享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick was born about 1410, in Powick, Worcestershire, England, his father, William de Beauchamp, was 56 and his mother, Lady Catherine Ufflete, was 42. He married Margaret de Ferrers before 1434, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 April 1475, in Powick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick est né environ 1410, à Powick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Beauchamp, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Ufflete, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Ferrers avant 1434, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1475, à Powick, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick um 1410 in Powick, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Beauchamp 56 und seine Mutter Lady Catherine Ufflete 42. Er hat vor 1434 in England, United Kingdom Margaret de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. April 1475 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Powick, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick è nato il circa 1410 nel Powick, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, William de Beauchamp, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catherine Ufflete, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Ferrers prima del 1434, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 aprile 1475, nel Powick, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powickが約1410年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアポウィックで生まれた時，父William de Beauchampは56歳，母Lady Catherine Uffleteは42歳であった。1434年以前にイギリスイギリスでMargaret de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1475年4月13日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアポウィックで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 워스스터실르 파윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Beauchamp(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catherine Ufflete(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1434년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1475년 4월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 파윅에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Beauchamp, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Ufflete, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Ferrers antes 1434, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1475, em Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick родился около 1410 г. в местности поуикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Beauchamp было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Ufflete, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Ferrers перед 1434 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 апреля 1475 г. в местности поуикк, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Beauchamp 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick nació aproximadamente 1410, en Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Beauchamp, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine Ufflete, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Margaret de Ferrers antes de 1434, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 13 de abril de 1475, en Powick, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
